description: A comprehensive platform for VIT BHOPAL students featuring Previous Year Questions (PYQs), student club information, discussion forums, and academic/career opportunities.

tech_stack.styling: Tailwind CSS 4, Lucide Icons, Framer Motion, Radix UI, Shadcn

resources.description: Verified study materials and PYQs available to users

view_history.description: User interaction logs for resource views

performance_ux.animations: Framer Motion and Tailwind Animate for smooth UI transitions

analytics_monitoring.tracking: Real-time traffic and user interaction monitoring

core_features.name: PYQ Repository
core_features.description: A centralized, searchable collection of Previous Year Questions for VIT BHOPAL subjects.

core_features.name: Clubs Directory
core_features.description: A dedicated section to explore and discover student clubs.

core_features.name: Discussion Forums
core_features.description: A platform for students to engage in academic and general discussions.

core_features.name: Opportunities Board
core_features.description: A space to find and share internships, hackathons, and other career opportunities.

core_features.name: Subject-wise Browsing
core_features.description: Organized navigation to find resources specific to various courses and subjects.

core_features.name: Student Contribution
core_features.description: An integrated system allowing students to upload and share resources with the community.

core_features.name: Admin Control Panel
core_features.description: Secure management tools for overseeing resources and user contributions.

core_features.name: Donation System
core_features.description: A dedicated page for users to support the platform's hosting and development costs.

core_features.name: Responsive UI
core_features.description: A modern, mobile-friendly interface with fluid animations and transitions.

core_features.name: Theme Customization
core_features.description: Support for both Dark and Light modes for an optimal user experience.

repository_goal: To provide easy access to academic resources, foster a collaborative learning environment, and act as a central hub for student activities.
